name: TEST - Total Amount Not Equal to Subtotal + Tax + Charges (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.amount_total)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_base)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_tax_calculated)
  and not is_empty(field.charges_calculated)
  and round(field.amount_total, 2) != round(
    field.amount_total_base
    + field.amount_total_tax_calculated
    + field.charges_calculated,
    2
  )
)

payload.content: Total Amount is not equal to Subtotal + Tax Amount + Charges.
Total Amount is not equal to Subtotal + Tax Amount + Charges.
